NOTES: Supported post data: post_title, post_name, post_excerpt, post_status. Also supports meta and taxonomies.
Taxonomies can be either the title or the ID of the taxonomy. Term names may actually work as well but they would look odd when creating missing terms
title: Advanced Forms for ACF plugin documentation

meta.rank_math_title: Introduction to Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Learn about the Advanced Forms for ACF plugin and how it can help you create powerful frontend forms for your ACF fields

meta.rank_math_title: Installing and activating the Advanced Forms for ACF plugin
meta.rank_math_description: Learn how to install and activate the Advanced Forms for ACF plugin and start creating powerful frontend forms for your ACF fields

meta.rank_math_title: Creating an ACF frontend form using Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Learn how to create a frontend form for your ACF fields using Advanced Forms for ACF

meta.rank_math_title: Displaying an ACF frontend form using Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Learn how to display ACF field groups on the front end via Advanced Forms for ACF

meta.rank_math_title: Storing ACF form entries using Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Learn how to store ACF form entries for review in WordPress admin using Advanced Forms for ACF

meta.rank_math_title: Send notification emails when an ACF form is submitted using Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Learn how to configure any number notification emails when using Advanced Forms for ACF

Pass-arbitrary-values-through-to-a-form..post_title: Pass arbitrary values through to a form

meta.rank_math_title: Pass arbitrary values through to a form using Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Learn how to pass custom args to an Advanced Forms for ACF form via shortcode or PHP, then read them in your hook callbacks.

meta.rank_math_title: Working with repeaters using Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Learn how to work with repeater fields in your ACF frontend forms using Advanced Forms for ACF

Applying-custom-restrictions-to-a-form.m.post_title: Applying custom restrictions to a form

Using-a-form-to-allow-users-to-create-ed.post_title: Using a form to allow users to create/edit a single post

How-to-add-the-current-page-title-to-an-.post_title: How to add the current page title to an email notification

Reload-and-reset-a-form-after-submission.post_title: Reload and reset a form after submission

How-to-use-a-form-to-manage-ACF-fields-o.post_title: How to use a form to manage ACF fields on an options page

meta.rank_math_title: Use a form to manage ACF fields on an options page
meta.rank_math_description: Use Advanced Forms for ACF to save and pre-fill ACF fields stored against an options page.

How-to-enforce-a-unique-field-value-for-.post_title: How to enforce a unique field value for each form entry

meta.rank_math_title: Enforce a unique field value for each Advanced Forms entry
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/before_submission to block duplicate values — e.g. one entry per email address — and surface a friendly error to the user.

How-to-add-a-post-status-select-field-to.post_title: How to add a post status select field to a form that creates posts

How-to-create-a-thank-you-page.md.post_title: How to create a thank you page

How-to-trigger-a-form-to-save-via-AJAX-a.post_title: How to trigger a form to save via AJAX as the form is updated

meta.rank_math_title: Auto-save an Advanced Forms submission via AJAX on every change
meta.rank_math_description: Combine AJAX, filter mode and post editing to update the same post in place without ever showing a success message.

How-to-dynamically-change-a-success-mess.post_title: How to dynamically change a success message when a post is updated

meta.rank_math_title: Dynamically change a form's success message when a post is updated
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/post_updated + af/form/success_message to swap in a custom success message when a form edits an existing post.

How-to-track-data-changes-when-editing-p.post_title: How to track data changes when editing posts or users

How-to-redirect-the-form-submission-afte.post_title: How to redirect the form submission after post creation

meta.rank_math_title: Redirect after a form creates a post — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Hook into af/form/editing/post_created to send users to a custom URL after a form creates a new post, with the new post's ID in the query string.

How-to-redirect-the-form-submission-afte.post_title: How to redirect the form submission after user creation

meta.rank_math_title: Redirect after a form creates a user — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Hook into af/form/editing/user_created to send users to a custom URL after a form creates a new user, with the new user's ID in the query string.

How-to-update-a-users-password-from-a-fo.post_title: How to update a user's password from a form field

meta.rank_math_title: Update a user's password from an Advanced Forms field
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/user_updated and wp_set_password() to let users change their own password from an Advanced Forms field.

How-to-assign-taxonomy-terms-to-posts.md.post_title: How to assign taxonomy terms to created/edited posts

meta.rank_math_title: Assign taxonomy terms to created or edited posts
meta.rank_math_description: ACF taxonomy fields don't currently set the terms against the post — bridge the gap with af/form/editing/post_created and wp_set_post_terms().

How-to-set-the-newly-created-user-as-aut.post_title: How to set the newly created user as author of a newly created post

meta.rank_math_title: Set a new user as the author of a new post — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/post_data to assign the newly created user as the author of a post created in the same form submission.

How-to-prevent-emails-sending-if-form-is.post_title: How to prevent emails sending if form is updating a post

meta.rank_math_title: Prevent email notifications when a form updates an existing post
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/email/recipient to skip notification emails on edit submissions and only send them when a form creates a new post.

How-to-set-the-post-excerpt-when-creatin.post_title: How to set the post excerpt when creating or editing a post

meta.rank_math_title: Set the post excerpt from an Advanced Forms field
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/post_data to populate post_excerpt (or any other post property) from a submitted form field.

How-to-change-a-users-role-on-post-creat.post_title: How to change a user's role on post creation

meta.rank_math_title: Change a user's role after a form creates a post — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/post_created and wp_update_user() to switch the post author's role after a form submission creates a new post.

How-to-change-a-users-role-on-user-creat.post_title: How to conditionally modify the user role on user creation

meta.rank_math_title: Conditionally set a user's role when an Advanced Forms form creates them
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/user_data and af_get_field() to pick a user role based on submitted form values during user creation.

How-to-change-the-value-of-a-field-durin.post_title: How to change the value of a field during submission based on another value

meta.rank_math_title: Change a field's value during form submission based on another value
meta.rank_math_description: Modify $_POST before Advanced Forms' submission handler runs to override field values based on what was submitted in other fields.

How-to-show-image-previews-when-uploaded.post_title: How to show image previews when uploaded to a form

meta.rank_math_title: Display Advanced Forms entries on the front end
meta.rank_math_description: Query the af_entry custom post type with WP_Query and ACF template functions to render form entries anywhere on your site.

Listing-and-deleting-posts-on-the-front-.post_title: Listing and deleting posts on the front end

How-to-create-multiple-posts-with-a-sing.post_title: How to create multiple posts with a single form submission

Use-a-custom-URL-parameter-to-edit-a-spe.post_title: Use a custom URL parameter to edit a specific post ID

meta.rank_math_title: Edit a specific post via a URL parameter — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Set the form's post arg to 'param' so Advanced Forms reads the target post ID from a query parameter — useful for create-then-edit flows and per-post edit links.

How-to-pre-fill-form-field-values.md.post_title: How to pre-fill form field values

meta.rank_math_title: Pre-fill Advanced Forms field values — values arg + prefill_value filter
meta.rank_math_description: Two ways to pre-fill Advanced Forms fields: pass a values array to advanced_form(), or hook af/field/prefill_value for programmatic per-field control.

How-to-access-the-post-ID-after-a-post-i.post_title: How to access the post ID after a post is created

meta.rank_math_title: Access the new post ID after Advanced Forms creates or updates a post
meta.rank_math_description: Read the created or updated post ID from AF()->submission['post'], plus the dedicated post_created and post_updated hooks for clean per-mode handling.

How-to-enable-all-pages-on-page-load-for.post_title: How to enable all pages on page load for a multi-page form

meta.rank_math_title: Make every page navigable from page load on an Advanced Forms multi-page form
meta.rank_math_description: A short JavaScript snippet that bumps max_page on form setup so every page in a multi-page Advanced Forms form is reachable from page load.

How-to-show-form-entry-data-on-a-thank-y.post_title: How to show form entry data on a 'thank you' page after form submission

meta.rank_math_title: Show a submission summary on the redirect / thank-you page
meta.rank_math_description: Use af_get_field() on the redirect target to render submitted values back to the visitor, with gotchas around trailing-slash redirects and page caching.

How-to-run-custom-JavaScript-immediately.post_title: How to run custom JavaScript immediately before form is submitted

meta.rank_math_title: Run custom JavaScript right before an Advanced Forms submission
meta.rank_math_description: Use af.addSubmissionStep on af/form/setup to intercept Advanced Forms submissions and run custom JavaScript — sync or async — before the request is sent.

How-to-manage-a-users-profile.md.post_title: How to manage a user's profile

meta.rank_math_title: Let users update their own profile with an Advanced Forms form
meta.rank_math_description: Render an Advanced Forms form with user="current" on an account page and submissions update the logged-in user's profile automatically.

How-to-edit-the-post-content-and-post-ti.post_title: How to edit the post content & post title

meta.rank_math_title: Map an Advanced Forms field to a post's title or content
meta.rank_math_description: Use the form's Editing settings (or the af/form/editing/post_data filter) to write submitted values into a post's core title and content fields.

How-to-provide-an-option-to-save-a-post-.post_title: How to provide an option to save a post as a draft

meta.rank_math_title: Let users choose between publish and draft when creating posts via a form
meta.rank_math_description: Add a radio field for the desired status and use af/form/editing/post_data to set post_status to draft or publish on submission.

How-to-append-new-rows-to-an-existing-re.post_title: How to append new rows to an existing repeater field

meta.rank_math_title: Append rows to an existing repeater field on form submission
meta.rank_math_description: Avoid rendering huge repeaters by removing the field from the form's mapping and using ACF's add_row() in a submission handler to append new rows instead.

Dynamically-conditionally-set-a-redirect.post_title: Dynamically / conditionally set a redirect on form submission

meta.rank_math_title: Dynamically set a redirect URL based on submitted values
meta.rank_math_description: Override AF()->submission['args']['redirect'] in af/form/submission to send users to different pages based on what they entered in the form.

How-to-hide-fields-based-on-the-current-.post_title: How to hide fields based on the current user's role

meta.rank_math_title: Hide form fields per-role with af/field/before_render
meta.rank_math_description: Return false from af/field/before_render to drop fields out of the rendered form for users without the required role — they never appear in the DOM.

Adding-custom-email-headers-to-notificat.post_title: Adding custom email headers (CC, BCC, Reply-To) to notification emails

meta.rank_math_title: Add CC, BCC, and Reply-To headers to Advanced Forms notification emails
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/email/headers (or the form-key-suffixed variant) to add custom email headers to a notification email — Reply-To, CC, BCC, or anything wp_mail() accepts.

How-to-assign-the-form-markup-to-a-varia.post_title: How to assign the form markup to a variable

meta.rank_math_title: Capture the form's HTML into a variable instead of echoing it
meta.rank_math_description: Set the echo arg to false on advanced_form() to have it return the form markup as a string — useful when wrapping the form or rendering it through a template engine.

How-to-pre-fill-fields-from-values-in-a-.post_title: How to pre-fill fields from values in a URL query string

meta.rank_math_title: Pre-fill Advanced Forms fields from URL query parameters
meta.rank_math_description: Read $_GET inside af/field/prefill_value to pre-fill a field with a value passed in the URL — handy for personalised links and tracking.
